helper_script_status.note: Codex consultation flagged that scripts/resolve-close-report.sh is currently UNTRACKED. The commit.md text references this helper at L49 and L54; subsequent /commit must classify and stage the helper alongside commands/commit.md or the slash-command contract will reference a non-tracked artifact. This is a commit-staging contract issue, NOT a cleanliness-organization issue — file is correctly placed in scripts/ with a kebab-case shell name conforming to scripts/README.md conventions; it has an executable purpose; it is referenced by commands/commit.md. Cleanliness gate does not block on git-tracked-vs-untracked state. Surfaced as observation_only.
